title: Provincial and territorial programs - Canada.ca
content:
## Provincial and territorial programs

## Benefit recalculation
Most benefit and credit payment amounts are recalculated each July based on information from your tax return. Check your notice of determination (in your CRA Account or via mail) for your payment explanation or visit our webpage if your payment stopped or changed before calling us.
Please select your province or territory of residence:
- Newfoundland and Labrador
- Northwest Territories
- Prince Edward Island

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
